title: catabrosella humilis
intro: Catabrosella humilis, also known as the "Catabrosella" or "Slender Catabrosella," is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb native to Australia, and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties. Catabrosella humilis is known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions or decoctions, often taken as a tea or added to topical creams and ointments for localized application.
